title: The Rise of Generative UI for Developers (CopilotKit)
summary: CopilotKit is a developer framework that enables generative UI and agentic interfaces in React and Next.js applications. It allows AI agents to render real UI components, share state with the frontend, and support human-in-the-loop approval workflows, moving beyond basic chatbot integrations in SaaS products.
writeup: This Better Stack video covers CopilotKit, a developer framework for building generative UI and agentic interfaces in React and Next.js applications. It matters because it pushes AI integration past basic chatbot widgets in SaaS products, letting agents act on the frontend directly. Key takeaways: AI agents can render real UI components, share state with the frontend, and support human-in-the-loop approval workflows. The video references the AG-UI concept as part of this agentic UI approach.
